games.name: Karlson
games.desc: Karlson is a milk-infused fellow, on a mission to take down anyone in his way to secure the milk.

games.name: Nothing
games.desc: The hardest game you're ever going to play. Or is it? Just do Nothing as the timer goes up. If you do Something, you lose.

games.name: Milkman Karlson
games.desc:
Karlson is thristy, and only you can help him get his milk. 
 Fight through 19 different levels to help Karlson retrieve his milk!

games.name: Super Mario 64 Freedom Edition
games.desc: Experience the nostalgia of Super Mario 64 for the Nintendo 64 but in HD in the Unity Engine as a first person shooter with guns. Shoot Goombas, rupture Bowsers organs, blow things up, jump, everything you could want from a Mario FPS

games.name: Something
games.desc: The easiest game you're ever going to play. Or is it? Keep doing Something as the timer goes up. If you do Nothing, you lose. If you don't like doing something, go do nothing

games.name: Sooper Fighterz
games.desc:
Controls:
 Alt + Enter to toggle fullscreen 
 Player 1 : WASD - Move, Q - Main Attack, E - Secondary Attack
Player 2 : TFGH - Move, R - Main Attack, Y - Secondary Attack 
 Player 3 : IJKL - Move, U - Main Attack, O - Secondary Attack 
 Player 4 : ^<V> - Move, Comma (,) - Main Attack, Period (.) - Secondary Attack

games.name: Troops
games.desc: Troops is a physics based battle simulator.  Choose how many troops you want to spawn, then watch them fight... that's it.

games.name: Airships 2
games.desc: A game about building airships, but better

games.name: Space Flight Simulator
games.desc: In Spaceflight Simulator, you will get to build your rockets, plan launches and flights, attempt landings, deploy payloads and explore new worlds.
